title: geum heterocarpum
intro: Geum heterocarpum, also known as the autumn geum or western avens, is a perennial plant species in the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions. Geum heterocarpum has been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among other health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
